name: Festive Cranberry Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the 2 cups of flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and baking soda in a bowl.
2. Using a pastry blender, cut in the shortening until crumbs form.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg and stir in the orange juice and orange rind.
4. Add the orange mixture to the crumb mixture all at once, stirring until just moistened.
5. Mix together the cranberries, walnuts, and 1 tablespoon of flour.
6. Fold this mixture into the batter.
7. Grease a loaf pan (8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2 inches) and pour in the batter.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, or until a cake tester or wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack to cool to room temperature.
10. Wrap the loaf tightly in aluminum foil and let stand overnight for better slicing.
